subcodes.first_line: God willing, may ye be blessed with His special divine favors and be adorned with the vesture of His love, which is in truth the cause and the source [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله بعنایت مخصوصه الهی فائز باشید و بطراز حبش که فی الحقیقه سبب و علت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for children and youth, @love of God, @firmness in the Covenant, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
